## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `yarn lint` passes
- [ ] `yarn test` passes
- [ ] New logic in `src/lib/` has test coverage
- [ ] No secrets in `NEXT_PUBLIC_` env vars
- [ ] `.env.example` and `README.md` updated if env vars or Docker behavior changed
- [ ] UI changes tested manually with `yarn dev`
